command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT j.id, j.userId, j.songTitle, j.artistName, j.genre, j.theme, j.mood, j.audioUrl, j.audioTier, j.audioDuration, j.sceneCount, j.status, j.creditCost
FROM musicVideoJobs j
WHERE j.id = 510098;

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.role, c.description, c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl, c.enableLipSync, c.gender, c.style
FROM videoCharacters c
WHERE c.jobId = 510098;
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 2: Unknown column 'j.songtitle' in 'field list'
